Framework.description: The compliance framework identifier (e.g., NIST_800_53_r5, ISO27001_2022, BSI_IT_Grundschutz)

ControlID.description: The unique control identifier within the framework (e.g., AC-2, A.5.1, SYS.1.1)

Family.description: The control family or domain (e.g., Access Control, Risk Management)

Description.description: Detailed description of the control requirements

RelatedCVEs.description: Related Common Vulnerabilities and Exposures IDs

ImplementationGuidance.description: Technical guidance for implementing the control

AssessmentMethods.description: Methods to assess control compliance (e.g., examine, test, interview)

Tags.description: Freeform tags for categorizing and matching controls (e.g., network, authentication, injection, crypto)
